name: Orc & Goblin Tribes
sources: Warhammer: The Old World — Ravening Hordes (2024)

rules.notes: 0-1 Black Orc Warboss, Orc Warboss or Orc Weirdnob per 1,000 points; Black Orc Bigbosses, Orc Bigbosses, Orc Weirdboys, Goblin Bosses, Goblin Shamans, Night Goblin Bosses and Night Goblin Shamans

Orc Mobs, Goblin Mobs, Snotling Mobs, Goblin Spider Rider Mobs and Goblin Wolf Rider Mobs; 0-1 Night Goblin Mobs per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken; 0-1 Night Goblin Squig Herd per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken; If your General is a Black Orc Boss, 0-1 Black Orc Mob may be taken as a Core choice
0-1 Night Goblin Mobs per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken
0-1 Night Goblin Squig Herd per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken

Black Orc Mobs, Troll Mobs, Orc Boar Boy Mobs, Orc Boar Chariots, Goblin Wolf Chariots and Snotling Pump Wagons; 0-1 Night Goblin Squig Hopper Mob per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken; 0-2 Goblin Bolt Throwas per 1,000 points
0-1 Night Goblin Squig Hopper Mob per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken
0-2 Goblin Bolt Throwas per 1,000 points

Arachnarok Spiders and Giants; 0-1 Mangler Squig per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken; 0-1 Goblin Rock Lobber per 1,000 points; 0-1 Doom Diver Catapult per 1,000 points; 0-1 Troll Hag if army includes one or more Troll Mobs
0-1 Mangler Squig per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken
0-1 Goblin Rock Lobber per 1,000 points
0-1 Doom Diver Catapult per 1,000 points
Any Orc & Goblin Tribes Army of Infamy composition list; Warriors of Chaos (Uneasy); Beastmen Brayherds (Uneasy); Tomb Kings of Khemri (Suspicious)
Da Boyz: If your General is a Black Orc Boss, Black Orc Mobs may be taken as Core choices
Da Boyz: 0-1 Black Orc Mob per Black Orc Boss (special rule)

special_abilities.name: Cunning Hunters
special_abilities.description: Wolf Rider Mobs can have Ambushers special rule; Goblin Bosses/Shamans on Giant Wolf also get Ambushers

special_abilities.name: Hit 'em Fast and Hit 'em 'Ard!
special_abilities.description: Orc models mounted on War Boar gain Impact Hits (1); 0-1 Boar Boy Mob per 1,000 pts may have Vanguard

special_abilities.name: Hunting Packs
special_abilities.description: Wolf Rider Mobs can exchange Open Order/Skirmishers with Close Order/Horde

special_abilities.name: On Da Move
special_abilities.description: All characters must be mounted; effects adjusted for mounted status

rules.notes: 0-1 Black Orc Warboss or Black Orc Bigboss per Black Orc Boar Chariot; 0-1 Orc Warboss or Orc Weirdnob per 1,000 points; Orc Bigbosses, Orc Weirdboys, Goblin Bosses and Goblin Shamans. All characters must be mounted.

Goblin Wolf Rider Mobs and Goblin Wolf Chariots; If your General is an Orc Boss, 0-1 Boar Boy Mob may be taken as a Core choice; If your General is a Black Orc Boss, 0-1 Black Orc Boar Chariot may be taken as a Core choice
Orc Boar Boy Mobs, Orc Boar Chariots and Snotling Pump Wagons
Black Orc Boar Chariots and Giants
Badlands Ogre Bulls; 0-1 Bonegrinder Giant
If your General is an Orc Boss, 0-1 Orc Boar Boy Mob may be taken as a Core choice
If your General is a Black Orc Boss, 0-1 Black Orc Boar Chariot may be taken as a Core choice

special_abilities.name: Enhanced Regeneration
special_abilities.description: Models with Regeneration may re-roll failed regen saves vs non-magical attacks

special_abilities.name: Oil Dis Waw!
special_abilities.description: Friendly Troll Mobs within command range of Shaman/Troll Hag can use that character's Leadership instead

special_abilities.name: Troll Tongue
special_abilities.description: Shamans in Troll Horde may know spells from Lore of Troll Magic in addition to normal lores

rules.notes: 0-1 Orc Warboss or Orc Weirdnob per 1,000 points; Orc Bigbosses, Orc Weirdboys, Goblin Bosses, Goblin Shamans and Troll Hags
1 Troll Mob per 1,000 points; 0-1 additional Troll Mob may be taken as a Core choice per Troll Hag taken; Orc Mobs, Goblin Mobs, Goblin Spider Rider Mobs and Goblin Wolf Rider Mobs
1 Troll Mob per 1,000 points
Troll Mobs and Goblin Wolf Chariots; 0-1 Orc Boar Boy Mobs per 1,000 points; 0-1 Orc Boar Chariots per 1,000 points
0-1 Orc Boar Boy Mobs per 1,000 points
0-1 Orc Boar Chariots per 1,000 points
Giants
Badlands Ogre Bulls; 0-1 Bonegrinder Giant

units.name: Black Orc Warboss
notes: Furious Charge does not apply to this model's mount (should it have one)

units.name: Black Orc Bigboss
notes: Furious Charge does not apply to this model's mount (should it have one)
Battle Standard Bearer: may be upgraded for +25 pts; can purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Orc Warboss

options.description: Replace light armour with heavy armour

notes: Furious Charge does not apply to this model's mount (should it have one)

units.name: Orc Bigboss

options.description: Replace light armour with heavy armour

notes: Furious Charge does not apply to this model's mount (should it have one)
Battle Standard Bearer: may be upgraded for +25 pts; can purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Orc Weirdnob
notes: Mob Rule: +1 to Casting rolls when joined to an Orc unit (Orcs or Black Orcs) with Unit Strength 10+

units.name: Orc Weirdboy
notes: Mob Rule: +1 to Casting rolls when joined to an Orc unit (Orcs or Black Orcs) with Unit Strength 10+

units.name: Goblin Warboss
notes: Battle Standard Bearer: may be upgraded for +25 pts; can purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Goblin Bigboss
notes: Battle Standard Bearer: may be upgraded for +25 pts; can purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Night Goblin Warboss

options.description: Mount on a Giant Cave Squig

notes: Battle Standard Bearer: may be upgraded for +25 pts; can purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Night Goblin Bigboss

options.description: Mount on a Giant Cave Squig

notes: Battle Standard Bearer: may be upgraded for +25 pts; can purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Orc Bully
notes: Special character that accompanies a war machine; cannot leave it; friendly war machines within Command range may use its Leadership

units.name: Troll Hag
notes: Troll Mother: any Grand Army list including one or more Troll Mobs may include 0-1 Troll Hag as a Rare choice
Indiscriminate Hunger: may make a special attack in combat to deal 1 Wound to an enemy unit; recovers a Wound for each Wound caused this way
Motherly Love: instead of normal attacks, roll on Motherly Love table (D6)

units.name: Kiknik Toofsnatcha
notes: Must be fielded as presented; General of any army using the Nomadic Waaagh! composition must be Kiknik
All Sneaky Like: 0-1 Goblin Wolf Rider Mob in same list may have Ambushers for free; +1/-1 to rolls for Goblin Wolf Rider Mobs with Ambushers
It & Run: if wins a round of combat, may choose to Fall Back in Good Order instead of pursuing
Da Boss's Trophy Rack: causes Fear and +1 combat result when Kiknik charged that turn
Da Skull Smasha: two profiles (Hammer: S+2, AP-1, Armour Bane 2, Magical Attacks; Pick: S, AP-2, Armour Bane 2, Magical Attacks, Multiple Wounds 2); choose profile at start of each combat

units.name: Ogdruz Swampdigga
notes: Trollhide Shawl: improves armour value by 1, Regeneration (5+) and Flammable
Da Troll Calla: friendly Troll Mobs within Command range may use his Leadership
Protect Da Boss: cannot be targeted by shooting or spells if within 3" of a friendly Troll Mob unless closest target
Syphoned Strength: +1 to Casting rolls when within 3" of a friendly Troll Mob with Unit Strength 6+ that is not fleeing
Bog-wood Staff: S+2, AP-1, Magical Attacks, Requires Two Hands; recovers a lost Wound for each unsaved Wound inflicted

units.name: War Boar
notes: Available to: Orc Warboss, Orc Bigboss, Black Orc Warboss, Black Orc Bigboss, Orc Weirdnob

units.name: Giant Wolf
notes: Available to: Goblin Warboss, Goblin Bigboss, Goblin Oddnob, Goblin Oddgit

units.name: Gigantic Spider
notes: A character mounted on a Gigantic Spider has +1 Wound
Available to: Goblin Warboss, Goblin Bigboss

errata.note: Added Move Through Cover special rule (RH FAQ v1.2)

units.name: Giant Cave Squig
notes: A character mounted on a Giant Cave Squig has +1 Wound
Available to: Night Goblin Warboss, Night Goblin Bigboss
Massive Gob: Combat, S, AP-1, Armour Bane (1), Killing Blow

units.name: Black Orc Mobs

options.description: Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per army)

notes: Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts
Da Boyz: army must include one Black Orc Boss for every Black Orc Mob and vice versa

units.name: Black Orc Mobs

options.description: Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per army)

notes: Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts
Da Boyz: army must include one Black Orc Boss for every Black Orc Mob and vice versa

units.name: Orc Mobs

options.description: Replace light armour with Frenzy (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

options.condition: Replace light armour with Frenzy (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

notes: Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts
Big Stabbas: unit gains Impact Hits (D3); applies to unit as a whole not individual models

units.name: Goblin Mobs

options.description: Replace Close Order with Skirmishers (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

notes: Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts — not listed in RH but inferred by analogy; check source

units.name: Night Goblin Mobs

options.notes: 0-1 per 10 Night Goblins in the unit, max 3; 25 pts each

options.description: Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

notes: 0-1 Night Goblin Mobs per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken (Core slot)

Netters: when combat chosen, may entangle one engaged enemy unit; roll D6: on 1 unit entangles itself, on 2+ enemy is entangled; entangled unit suffers -1 Strength (minimum 1) until end of Combat phase; not cumulative
Fanatics are concealed within the unit; released during Start of Turn sub-phase

errata.note: Fanatic option clarified: 0-1 per 10 Night Goblins, max 3 per unit (RH FAQ v1.2)

units.name: Snotling Mobs
notes: Points value is per base (swarm base)

units.name: Nasty Skulkers
notes: Concealed within Goblin Mobs (0-3 per unit); revealed at the start of first round of combat during Step 1.1 of Choose Combat & Fight sub-phase; cannot be revealed at other times; removed as casualties if concealing unit is destroyed or flees before revelation
Points value is per model (added to Goblin Mob cost)

units.name: Fanatics
notes: Concealed within Night Goblin Mobs (0-3 per unit, +25 pts each)

Release the Fanatics: concealing unit may release one or more Fanatics during any Start of Turn sub-phase; Fanatic moves 2D6" each Compulsory Moves sub-phase in controller-chosen direction; thereafter moves 2D6" in random direction each Compulsory Moves sub-phase; any unit moved through suffers D6 S5 hits each with AP-3; ignores 1" rule; removed if it moves into difficult/dangerous/impassable terrain or rolls a natural double; removed as casualties if concealing unit destroyed or flees before release

units.name: Night Goblin Squig Herds
notes: 0-1 per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken (Core slot)
Must contain at least 1 Squig Herder per 5 Cave Squigs; Cave Squigs occupy front ranks

Squigs Go Wild: if Squig Herd ever Breaks and flees, Cave Squigs go wild; every unit (friend or foe) within 2D6" suffers D3 S5 hits, AP-1; +1 to D3 per additional 5 Cave Squigs; then unit treated as destroyed
Cave Squig Huge gob: Combat, S, AP-1, Armour Bane (1)
Motley Crew applies to Squig Herders only

units.name: Troll Mobs
notes: Troll vomit: Combat, S3, AP-2; Troll makes one additional attack each turn with this weapon after all other attacks (including Stomp Attacks); hits automatically
A unit may contain only one type of Troll

units.name: Orc Boar Boy Mobs

options.description: Replace light armour with heavy armour
Replace light armour with Frenzy (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

options.condition: Replace light armour with Frenzy (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

notes: Furious Charge applies to Orc Boar Boys & Boss only; Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts

units.name: Orc Boar Boy Mobs

options.description: Replace light armour with heavy armour
Replace light armour with Frenzy (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

options.condition: Replace light armour with Frenzy (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

notes: Furious Charge applies to Orc Boar Boys & Boss only; Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts

options.description: Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Feigned Flight special rule (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Reserve Move special rule (0-1 per 1,000 pts)
Magic standard worth up to 50 pts (0-1 per 1,000 pts)

units.name: Night Goblin Squig Hopper Mobs
notes: 0-1 per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken (Special slot)
Boss may purchase magic items up to 25 pts
Huge gob: Combat, S, AP-1, Armour Bane (1)

units.name: Orc Boar Chariots

options.description: Add a third Orc crew member

notes: Character mount: may be included as a character's mount; points added to rider's total

units.name: Goblin Wolf Chariots

options.description: Upgrade one model to a standard bearer

notes: Character mount: may be included as a character's mount; points added to rider's total

units.name: Black Orc Boar Chariots

options.description: Each Black Orc Crew: additional hand weapon
Each Black Orc Crew: great weapon

notes: Character mount: Black Orc Warboss or Bigboss may be mounted on a Black Orc Boar Chariot for +130 pts
Furious Charge applies to Black Orc Crew only

units.name: Black Orc Boar Chariots

options.description: Each Black Orc Crew: additional hand weapon
Each Black Orc Crew: great weapon

notes: Character mount: Black Orc Warboss or Bigboss may be mounted on a Black Orc Boar Chariot for +130 pts
Furious Charge applies to Black Orc Crew only

units.name: Wyvern

weapon_profiles.name: Venomous Tail
weapon_profiles.notes: Must make one attack each turn with the venomous tail

notes: A character mounted on a Wyvern has +1 Toughness and +4 Wounds
Available to: Orc Warboss, Black Orc Warboss, Orc Weirdnob (Orc Weirdnobs only)
Character mount only; points added to rider's total

units.name: Arachnarok Spiders
notes: Character mount: may be included as a character's mount (considered a chariot mount due to Howdah rule); points added to rider's total
Venom surge: Combat, S, AP-2, Multiple Wounds (D6), Poisoned Attacks, Strike First; may choose to make one attack with this weapon each turn
Spidersilk lobber: 12-48", S2(4), AP-(−1), Bombardment, Cumbersome; uses stone thrower rules; on Misfire this model loses 1 Wound instead of rolling on Misfire table

units.name: Mangler Squigs
notes: 0-1 per Night Goblin Chief or Night Goblin Shaman taken (Rare slot)
Ker-splat: treats all difficult terrain as dangerous terrain
Spiked Ball & Chains: Impact Hits caused have AP-3
Colossal fang-filled gob: Combat, S, AP-2, Killing Blow

units.name: Giants
notes: Giant Attacks: instead of normal attacks, roll on Giant Attacks table (D6): 1='Eadbutt (D3+1 wounds no saves), 2=Belly Flop (5" template), 3-4=Mighty Swing (D6+1 attacks S+1 AP-2), 5=Thump With Club (S+4 AP-4 Multiple Wounds D6), 6=Jump Up & Down (D6+1 S hits no armour save)
Pick Up And...: vs regular/heavy infantry, may pick up enemy models instead of normal attacks

units.name: Goblin Bolt Throwas
notes: 0-2 per 1,000 points (Special slot)

units.name: Doom Diver Catapults
notes: 0-1 per 1,000 points (Rare slot)

Doom Diver: when shooting, after Scatter, may roll D3 and move the 3" blast template that many inches in any direction; on indirect fire, if Hit! rolled use arrow above Hit symbol; move template Artillery dice minus D3 inches in that direction (minimum 0)

units.name: Goblin Rock Lobbers
notes: 0-1 per 1,000 points (Rare slot)

units.name: Badlands Ogre Bulls

options.description: Replace light armour with heavy armour
Magic standard worth up to 50 pts

notes: Mercenaries: may be taken as Mercenaries in any Grand Army composition list with Mercenaries category; subject to Misbehaving Mercenaries rules
Ogre Charge: AP of Impact Hits is improved by current Rank Bonus of the unit
Ironfist: S AP-; Extra Attacks (1), Requires Two Hands; improves armour value by 1

errata.note: Crusher (champion) upgrade cost corrected 6→7 pts (RH FAQ v1.2)

units.name: Bonegrinder Giants
notes: Dogs of War: 0-1 Bonegrinder Giant may be taken as Mercenary in Orc & Goblin Tribes, Warriors of Chaos, or Beastmen Brayherds Grand Army lists; subject to Misbehaving Mercenaries rules

Bonegrinder Giant Attacks table: determines attacks vs Little Things (regular/heavy infantry, swarms, light/heavy cavalry, war beasts), Big Things (monstrous infantry/cavalry, light chariot, war machine) and Bigger Things (heavy chariot, monstrous creature, behemoth)

magic_items.name: Dragonblade
magic_items.description: Dragonblade is inscribed with a Rune of Fury and a Grudge Rune, as described in Forces of Fantasy.

magic_items.name: Burning Blade*
magic_items.description:
Once unsheathed, the cutting edge of the Burning Blade writhes endlessly with a living flame.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Flaming AttacksMagical Attacks*Extremely Common
*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Biting Blade
magic_items.description:
The serrated length of the Biting Blade cuts through armour of plate and mail with terrible ease.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-2Armour Bane (1)Magical Attacks

magic_items.name: Sword of Striking*
magic_items.description:
Engraved with runes of accuracy and swiftness, the Sword of Striking is an elegant weapon of great precision.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Magical AttacksNotes: During the Combat phase, the wielder of the Sword of Striking has a +1 modifier to their rolls To Hit.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Wollopa's One Hit Wunda
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. Once per game, during the first round of combat, wielder may use: Combat, S10, AP-3, Magical Attacks, Strike First. At all other times counts as a hand weapon with Magical Attacks.
magic_items.restrictions: Goblin and Night Goblin Bosses only

weapon_profile.name: Wollopa's One Hit Wunda
weapon_profile.notes: Single use. First round of combat only.

magic_items.name: Berserker Blade
magic_items.description:
Quenched in the blood of untold fallen enemies, the Berserker Blade eternally hungers for battle.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-Extra Attacks (+1)ImpetuousMagical AttacksNotes: The wielder of the Berserker Blade is Impetuous.
Notes: The wielder of the Berserker Blade is Impetuous.

errata.note: Weapon profile corrected: Extra Attacks (+1); notes added (Rulebook FAQ v1.5.2)

magic_items.name: Sword of Might*
magic_items.description:
Bound around with powerful runes that increase its power and enhance the strength of its bearer.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Magical Attacks*Extremely Common
*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Backstabber's Blade*
magic_items.description: Combat, S+1, AP-1, Magical Attacks.
magic_items.rules_text: If engaged with an enemy's flank arc, may re-roll any failed rolls To Wound. If engaged with an enemy's rear arc, may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit and To Wound. Extremely Common magic item.
magic_items.restrictions: Goblin Bosses and Night Goblin Bosses only

magic_items.name: Sword of Swiftness
magic_items.description:
Crafted from magically attuned materials and ensorcelled to strike as if with a life of its own.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Magical AttacksStrike First

magic_items.name: Da Akrit Axe
magic_items.description: Combat, S+1, AP-, Armour Bane (1), Magical Attacks.
magic_items.rules_text: Wearer may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made whilst using this weapon. However, the Strength modifier only applies during the first round of combat.

magic_items.name: Giant Blade
magic_items.description:
A broad and heavy blade wrought with powerful enchantments that only increase the weight of its blows, the Giant Blade is an unsubtle weapon.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-Armour Bane (2)Magical AttacksMultiple Wounds (2)

magic_items.name: Hell-forged Axe
magic_items.description:
In the midst of battle, smoke billows and flames burst from the glowing blade of this fell weapon.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Armour Bane (3)Flaming AttacksMagical Attacks

magic_items.name: Sword of Sorrow
magic_items.description: Though it possesses no special properties when wielded in combat, it is said that a gesture with the Sword of Sorrow can pierce an enemy's heart from afar.

magic_items.name: Da Choppiest Choppa
magic_items.description: Combat, S+1, AP-3, Magical Attacks.

magic_items.name: Spelleater Axe
magic_items.description:
Forged of rune-encrusted brass, the Spelleater Axe is anathema to the Winds of Magic.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-1Magical AttacksMagic Resistance (-2)

magic_items.name: Porko's Pigstikka
magic_items.description: Combat, S+1, AP-1, Armour Bane (1), Magical Attacks.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is 'cavalry', 'monster' or 'chariot' only. Strength and Armour Piercing modifiers apply only during the first round of combat. During a turn in which the wielder charged, grants +1 Attack for each rank the enemy unit has.

magic_items.name: Headsman's Axe
magic_items.description:
A wide bladed axe, steeped in the blood of its countless helpless victims.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Killing BlowMagical AttacksRequires Two Hands

magic_items.name: Dragon Slaying Sword
magic_items.description:
A mighty blade, wielded by many great heroes in their endless quests to slay foul monsters.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Magical AttacksMonster Slayer

magic_items.name: Martog's Best Basha
magic_items.description: Combat, S+1, AP-2, Magical Attacks, Requires Two Hands.
magic_items.rules_text: Wearer has +1 to their Weapon Skill and Initiative characteristics.

magic_items.name: Meteor Hammer
magic_items.description:
No matter who wields this mighty hammer, their blows will land with the force of a meteor plummeting from the heavens.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-3Magical AttacksRequires Two HandsNotes: When making a roll To Wound with this weapon, a roll of a 3+ is always a success, regardless of the target's Toughness.

magic_items.name: Bigger, Choppier Axe
magic_items.description: Combat, S+2, AP-2, Killing Blow, Magical Attacks, Requires Two Hands, Strikes Last.

magic_items.name: Duellist's Blades
magic_items.description:
Fine weapons, forged by the greatest of swordsmiths and imbued with potent runes of quickening.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-1Extra Attacks (+2)Magical AttacksRequires Two Hands

magic_items.name: Sword of Battle
magic_items.description:
A simple weapon, yet finely crafted, blessed by mighty mages and revered priests.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Armour Bane (1)Extra Attacks (+1)Magical Attacks

magic_items.name: Cackling Blade
magic_items.description:
Those who carry the Cackling Blade relinquish all self control until the battle has long ended - often to their peril.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Extra Attacks (+D6)Magical AttacksNotes: If a natural 6 is rolled for the Extra Attacks (+D6) special rule, the wielder of the Cackling Blade immediately loses a single Wound.

magic_items.name: Battleaxe of the Last Big Waaagh!
magic_items.description: Combat, S+2, AP-2, Extra Attacks (+D6), Magical Attacks, Requires Two Hands, Strike Last.
magic_items.rules_text: If a natural 6 is rolled for the Extra Attacks (+D6) rule, the Battleaxe loses the Extra Attacks (+D6) rule at the end of the current Combat phase.

weapon_profile.name: Battleaxe of the Last Big Waaagh!

magic_items.name: Ogre Blade
magic_items.description: A massive sword of terrible power, forged in the darkest mountains of the Old World.

magic_items.name: Charmed Shield*
magic_items.description: A simple shield hung with charms and fetishes to bring the bearer good fortune. In the heat of battle, such ornamentation rarely survives intact for long.

magic_items.name: Enchanted Shield*
magic_items.description:
A finely crafted and sturdy shield that protects its bearer from harm time and time again.
The Enchanted Shield is a shield. In addition, its bearer has a 6+ Ward save against any wounds suffered that were caused by a non-magical enemy attack.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Armour of Meteoric Iron
magic_items.rules_text:
This heavy armour was forged of ore mined from a meteor that fell from the heavens.
The Armour of Meteoric Iron gives its wearer an armour value of 5+, which cannot be improved in any way. However, nor can this armour value be reduced in any way either.

magic_items.name: Spiteful Shield
magic_items.rules_text: Counts as a shield. Any enemy model that rolls a natural 1 when making a roll To Hit or To Wound against the wielder of the Spiteful Shield during the Combat phase immediately suffers a Strength 4 hit with an AP of -.

armour_profile.notes: Counts as a shield. Enemy natural 1s To Hit/Wound in Combat inflict S4 hit on attacker.

magic_items.name: Trailblazer's Hauberk
magic_items.description: The local flora seems to shift and bend to allow the wearer to pass unimpeded through even the thickest briar.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry only. The Trailblazer's Hauberk is a suit of heavy armour. In addition, its wearer gains the Move Through Cover and Scouts special rules.

magic_items.name: Levitating Shield
magic_items.description: Born aloft by a cunning enchantment, this shield seems to place itself between its owner and the weapons of the enemy.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry only. The Levitating Shield is a shield. In addition, the bearer may use it alongside a weapon with the Requires Two Hands special rule during combat.

magic_items.name: Spellshield*
magic_items.description:
The Winds of Magic lose their power when in the presence of the brass-bound Spellshield.
The Spellshield is a shield. In addition, its bearer has a 5+ Ward save against any wounds suffered that were caused by a Magic Missile, a Magical Vortex, or an Assailment spell.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Armour of Mork
magic_items.description: Suit of heavy armour.
magic_items.rules_text: Wearer has Magic Resistance (-2).

magic_items.name: Shield of the Warrior True
magic_items.description:
A heavy shield of oak and iron that turns aside all but the most deadly of missiles.
The Shield of the Warrior True is a shield. In addition, its bearer has a 5+ Ward save against any wounds suffered during the Shooting phase.

magic_items.name: Dead 'Ard Armour
magic_items.description: Full plate armour.
magic_items.rules_text: Wearer improves their Toughness characteristic by 1.
magic_items.restrictions: Black Orc Bosses and Orc Bosses whose troop type is 'infantry', 'cavalry' or 'chariot' only

magic_items.name: Glittering Scales
magic_items.description:
Each and every scale of this armoured surcoat is crafted from shards of precious metal.
The Glittering Scales is a suit of light armour. In addition, once per turn, you may make your opponent re-roll a single roll To Hit made against the wearer.

magic_items.name: Armour of Silvered Steel
magic_items.description:
Polished to a mirror shine, the Armour of Silvered Steel encases its wearer from head to toe.
The Armour of Silvered Steel is a suit of armour that gives its wearer an armour value of 3+ which cannot be improved in any way.

magic_items.name: Trollhide Trousers*
magic_items.rules_text: May be worn with other armour. Improves wearer's armour value by 1 (to a maximum of 2+). Wearer has the Regeneration (5+) special rule. Extremely Common magic item.

armour_profile.notes: May be worn with other armour. Max armour value 2+.

magic_items.name: Bedazzling Helm
magic_items.description: A gleaming helm that confuses and confounds enemies, causing their blows to fall wide of their mark.
magic_items.restrictions: Models whose troop type is 'infantry' or 'cavalry' only.

errata.note: Restriction added: infantry/cavalry only (Rulebook FAQ v1.5.2)

magic_items.name: Armour of Destiny
magic_items.description: A suit of magical armour forged at the confluence of two ley lines, the Armour of Destiny protects its wearer from harm beyond mortal ken.
magic_items.restrictions: May only be worn by a model that is equipped with (or has the option to be equipped with) armour.

magic_items.name: Luckstone*
magic_items.description: Can luck be trapped within a dull stone pendant? Possibly.
magic_items.rules_text:
Single use. The bearer of a Luckstone can re-roll a single failed Armour Save roll.*Extremely Common
Single use. The bearer of a Luckstone can re-roll a single failed Armour Save roll. *Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Obsidian Lodestone*
magic_items.description: An air of chill hangs about obsidian, stilling the Winds of Magic in its presence.
magic_items.rules_text: A model may purchase up to three Obsidian Lodestones. A model that bears a single Obsidian Lodestone has Magic Resistance (-1), a model that bears two has Magic Resistance (-2), and a model that bears three has Magic Resistance (-3).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: The Collar of Zorga
magic_items.rules_text: Any enemy 'beast of burden' that directs its attacks against the wearer of the Collar of Zorga or their unit during the Combat phase suffers a -1 modifier to its rolls To Hit.

magic_items.name: Paymaster's Coin*
magic_items.description: This heavy golden coin may not be enchanted, but its weight in its owner's pocket certainly inspires heroism.
magic_items.rules_text:
Single use. The bearer of a Paymaster's Coin can re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made during the Combat phase.*Extremely Common
Single use. The bearer of a Paymaster's Coin can re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made during the Combat phase. *Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Ironhide Talisman
magic_items.description: It is said that the one who bears this powerful heirloom can endure even the most telling blows.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry only. Any enemy model that makes a successful roll To Hit against the bearer of the Ironhide Talisman during the Shooting phase or Combat phase must re-roll any rolls To Wound of a natural 6. Note that this magic item does not work against attacks that hit automatically.

magic_items.name: Talisman of Protection
magic_items.description:
A powerful magical aura surrounds this humble talisman, protecting its wearer from harm.
The Talisman of Protection gives its bearer a 5+ Ward save against any wounds suffered.

magic_items.name: Dawnstone
magic_items.description: Talismans are tokens of magical protection, worn by warriors to protect them from harm both physical and magical. The magic trapped within this semi-precious stone binds together shattered armour plates.
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer of the Dawnstone may re-roll any Armour Save roll of a natural 1.

magic_items.name: Effigy of Mork
magic_items.rules_text: Any model that directs its attacks against the bearer of the Effigy of Mork during the Combat phase suffers a -1 modifier to its rolls To Hit.

magic_items.name: Glowy Green Amulet
magic_items.description: If the bearer (and any unit they have joined) is the target of an enemy spell, they may use the Glowy Green Amulet instead of making a Wizardly dispel attempt.
magic_items.rules_text: Roll a D6. On 2+, the spell is dispelled. However, if 1 is rolled, the Glowy Green Amulet explodes — destroyed and bearer loses 1 Wound. Cannot be used against a perfect invocation.

magic_items.name: Icon of Fortitude
magic_items.description: Carefully woven with protective enchantments, this exquisite brooch is said to shield its bearer from the deadliest blows.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry or cavalry only. The bearer is immune to the Multiple Wounds (X) special rule. If the bearer is wounded by an attack with this special rule, they suffer a single wound.

magic_items.name: Sparkly Wizard Finda
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer has the Magic Resistance (-2) and Hatred (enemy Wizards) special rules.

magic_items.name: Potion of Foolhardiness*
magic_items.description: A magical brew that fills the drinker with courage… it may actually just be strong liquor.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Foolhardiness can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model gains the Immune To Psychology special rule.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Fungus Wine*
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase, if not engaged in combat, may distribute Fungus Wine to their unit by making a Leadership test (using own Leadership). If passed, until next Start of Turn sub-phase, character and any unit they have joined gains the Immune to Psychology special rule. Extremely Common magic item.

magic_items.name: Potion of Speed*
magic_items.description: A powerful potion with a terrible aftertaste that sharpens the wits and speeds the reactions.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Speed can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Initiative characteristic (to a maximum of 10).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: 'Eadbuttin' 'At*
magic_items.description: Wearer gains the Impact Hits (1) special rule.
magic_items.rules_text: 0-1 per model. This Impact Hit has an Armour Piercing characteristic of -2. Extremely Common magic item.

magic_items.name: Becalming Orb
magic_items.description: This pulsing crystal orb can syphon the Winds of Magic away from its bearer's enemies.
magic_items.rules_text: Single Use. The bearer of the Becalming Orb may cast the following Bound spell, with a Power level of 1:TypeHexCasting Value8+RangeSelfUntil your next Start of Turn sub-phase, enemy Wizards that are within 15" of the caster when attempting to cast a spell must increase that spell's casting value by 2.

magic_items.name: Potion of Toughness*
magic_items.description: Distilled by magical means, this potion is sure to make the drinker all but invulnerable.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Toughness can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Toughness characteristic (to a maximum of 10).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Da Thinkin' Orc's 'At
magic_items.description: Wearer improves their Initiative characteristic by 1.
magic_items.rules_text: In addition, the wearer and any unit they have joined is not subject to the Impetuous special rule.

magic_items.name: Potion of Strength*
magic_items.description: A concoction of strength-giving vegetables and roots, mixed together with a touch of magic.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Strength can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Strength characteristic (to a maximum of 10).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Grisly Trophy Rack
magic_items.description: All enemy units within 6" of the bearer of the Grisly Trophy Rack suffer a -1 modifier to their Leadership characteristic (to a minimum of 2).
magic_items.restrictions: Black Orc Bosses, Orc Bosses, Goblin Bosses and Night Goblin Bosses only

magic_items.name: Potion of Fervour
magic_items.description: This noxious brew allows those who risk drinking it a moment of godliness upon the battlefield.
magic_items.rules_text: Single Use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of the Potion of Fervour can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Attacks characteristic (to a maximum of 10). Note that a model can only consume a single potion (of any type) per Command phase.

magic_items.name: Healing Potion*
magic_items.description: Purveyors of magical potions make many bold claims. Sometimes they are true, sometimes not.
magic_items.rules_text:
Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Healing Potion can consume it. The model immediately recovers D3 lost Wounds.*Extremely Common
Single use. The model immediately recovers D3 lost Wounds.

magic_items.name: Ruby Ring of Ruin
magic_items.description: Uttering a simple command, the wearer of the ring can hurl a flaming ball of ruin at their foes.
magic_items.rules_text: The wielder of the Ruby Ring of Ruin can cast the Fireball spell from the Lore of Battle Magic as a Bound spell, with a Power Level of 1.

errata.note: Points corrected (Rulebook FAQ v1.5.2); rule text updated

magic_items.name: Arch-Lightning Rod
magic_items.description: Crackling lightning fills the heavens with peril, grounding the creatures of the sky.

magic_items.name: Flying Carpet
magic_items.description: Woven from the finest silks in a far-off land, this splendid rug does more than warm the feet!
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is regular infantry or heavy infantry only. The bearer of the Flying Carpet gains the Fly (8) and Swiftstride special rules. However, the bearer cannot join a unit.

magic_items.name: Wizarding Hat
magic_items.description: This splendid hat, once the property of a long dead Wizard, is still haunted by their ghost.

magic_items.name: Big Boss 'At
magic_items.rules_text: During Command sub-phase of their turn, if not engaged in combat, the wearer may make a Leadership test (using own Leadership). If passed, until the next Start of Turn sub-phase, this character and any unit they have joined gains the Unbreakable special rule.

magic_items.name: Necklace of Blessed Teef
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer may re-roll any Armour Save roll, Ward Save roll or Regeneration Save roll of a natural 1.

magic_items.name: Earthing Rod
magic_items.description: Inert metal runs the length of the Wizard's staff, drawing magical overloads safely into the earth.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. Should they miscast a spell, a Wizard can use the Earthing Rod to re-roll the result rolled on the Miscast table.

magic_items.name: Arcane Familiar
magic_items.description: Many Wizards are accompanied by familiars gifted with arcane knowledge. These creatures constantly whisper secrets to their master.

magic_items.name: Dispel Scroll*
magic_items.description: The Wizard reads aloud a charm of unbinding from an enchanted scroll.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. A Wizard may use this scroll when attempting a Wizardly dispel. If they do so, roll an extra D6 when making the Dispel roll and discard the lowest result. However, if a double 1 is rolled on any two of the dice rolled, the Wizard is outclassed in the art.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Power Scroll*
magic_items.description: Unfurling a scroll bearing runes of power can greatly increase the spell's power.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. A Wizard may use this scroll when attempting to cast a spell. If they do so, roll an extra D6 when making the Casting roll and discard the lowest result. However, if a double 1 is rolled on any two of the dice rolled, the spell is miscast.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Da Hag's Brew
magic_items.description: In addition to the Lores of Magic they may normally know spells from, the bearer of Da Hag's Brew may know spells from the Lore of Troll Magic.
magic_items.restrictions: Orc Shamans, Goblin Shamans and Night Goblin Shamans only

magic_items.name: Idol of Mork
magic_items.description: Bearer increases their Dispel range by 3".
magic_items.rules_text: Additionally, once per turn, when attempting a Wizardly dispel, the bearer of the Idol of Mork may re-roll the Dispel roll.

magic_items.name: Lore Familiar
magic_items.description:
By creating a magical homunculus, a Wizard is able to better recall forgotten details of their studies.
The owner of a Lore Familiar does not randomly generate their spells. Instead, they may choose which spells they know from their chosen lore (including that lore's signature spell).

magic_items.name: Scroll of Disruption
magic_items.description: When spoken aloud, the words upon this ancient scroll cause the Winds of Magic to bluster and the spells of the enemy to unravel.
magic_items.rules_text: Once per turn, the bearer of the Scroll of Disruption may re-roll a Dispel roll.*Note all dice are re-rolled, including any bonus or discard dice granted by special rules or magic items.

magic_items.name: Tome of Spellcraft
magic_items.description: Reading aloud from a dusty tome of great age, the Wizard enunciates their spells with unrivalled clarity and precision.
magic_items.rules_text: Once per turn, the bearer of the Tome of Spellcraft may re-roll a Casting roll.*Note all dice are re-rolled, including any bonus or discard dice granted by special rules or magic items.

magic_items.name: Buzgob's Knobbly Staff
magic_items.rules_text: Once per turn, the bearer of the Buzgob's Knobbly Staff may re-roll a Casting roll.

magic_items.name: Staff of Quietude
magic_items.description: With a gesture, the bearer of the Staff of Quietude calms the Winds of Magic, causing spells and conjurations to dissipate into the other.

magic_items.name: Glittering Wotnots
magic_items.description: If bearer (or their unit) is the target of an enemy spell, may use the Glittering Wotnots instead of making a Wizardly dispel attempt.
magic_items.rules_text: Roll a D6. On 1-3, no effect. On 4+, spell reflected back upon the caster — caster (and their unit) become the target; caster may make a Wizardly dispel attempt.

magic_items.name: Idol of Gork
magic_items.description: Bearer increases the range of all their spells by 3".
magic_items.rules_text: Additionally, once per turn, the bearer of the Idol of Gork may re-roll a Casting roll.

magic_items.name: Wand of Jet
magic_items.description: Carved from brittle jet, this wand refines a Wizard's power, but is easily broken.

magic_items.name: Scroll of Transmogrification*
magic_items.description: For a Wizard, there are few things better than the rush of joy felt upon turning a rival into a frog!

magic_items.name: Staff of Baduumm
magic_items.description: Bearer applies a +D3 modifier to the result of any Casting roll they make.
magic_items.rules_text: However, if they roll a natural double 1 or double 6 when making a Casting roll, centre a 5" blast template over the bearer — every model (friend or foe) underneath risks being hit and suffering a single Strength 6 hit with an AP of -1. The staff is then destroyed and cannot be used again. This is in addition to the effects of rolling a natural double 1 or double 6 when making a Casting roll.

magic_items.name: Feedback Scroll
magic_items.description: When read aloud, this charm causes ætheric energy to flood back towards the enemy Wizard.

magic_items.name: Banner of the Wildz
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Banner of the Wildz gains the Move through Cover special rule.

magic_items.name: Guff's Windy Banner
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Guff's Windy Banner may re-roll any failed Panic test.

magic_items.name: Da Banner Of Da Nomadz
magic_items.description: When a unit carrying Da Banner Of Da Nomadz makes a Charge, Flee or Pursuit roll, it may re-roll any dice that roll a natural 1, before discarding any dice that are required to be discarded.

magic_items.name: Monster Hunter's Tapestry
magic_items.description:
Those who have earned the right to fight under this standard have battled some of the Old World's most dangerous beasts and lived to tell the tale.
Enemy units may not make Stomp Attacks against a unit carrying the Monster Hunter's Tapestry.

magic_items.name: The Blazing Banner
magic_items.description: An eternal flame flickers about the weapons of those that march beneath the Blazing Banner.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Blazing Banner gains the Flaming Attacks special rule.

magic_items.name: War Banner
magic_items.description:
A proud banner of great age. Those that march beneath the War Banner fight with grim resolve.
When calculating its combat result, a unit carrying the War Banner may claim an additional bonus of +1 combat result point.

magic_items.name: Banner of Swirling Wind
magic_items.description: Gale-force winds surge around this standard so fiercely that arrows and shot are blown forcefully away from their target.
magic_items.rules_text: Any enemy model that shoots at a unit carrying the Banner of Swirling Wind suffers an additional -1 To Hit modifier.

magic_items.name: Rampaging Banner
magic_items.description:
As a matter of honour, those that fight beneath the Rampaging Banner are always first into the fray.
When a unit carrying the Rampaging Banner declares a charge, it may re-roll its Charge roll.

magic_items.name: Da Angry Ladz Flag
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying Da Angry Ladz Flag gains the Frenzy special rule.

magic_items.name: Da Banner of Butchery
magic_items.description: All models in a unit carrying Da Banner of Butchery have a +1 modifier to their Strength characteristic during a turn in which they charge.

magic_items.name: Da Spider Banner
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying Da Spider Banner gains the Poisoned Attacks special rule. If the unit already has the Poisoned Attacks special rule, then their attacks will wound automatically on a roll of a natural 5 or 6 To Hit, rather than the usual 6.

magic_items.name: Razor Standard
magic_items.description: Hung with hundreds of wickedly sharp blades, an air of sharpness radiates outwards from the Razor Standard.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Razor Standard gains the Armour Bane (2) special rule.

magic_items.name: Waaagh! Banner
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Waaagh! Banner increases its maximum possible charge range by 3" and, when it makes a Charge roll, may apply a +D3 modifier to the result.

magic_items.name: Banner of Iron Resolve
magic_items.description: No regiment that stands beneath the Banner of Iron Resolve has ever fled from the foe.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Banner of Iron Resolve gains the Stubborn special rule.

magic_items.name: Banner of the Steadfast
magic_items.description: Woven into the bright fabric of this banner is a scene of unimaginable gallantry, a scene that serves to inspire those who fight in its shadow to hold their ground no matter the odds.

magic_items.name: The Big Red Raggedy Flag
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying this flag has a +1 modifier to its Weapon Skill characteristic (to a maximum of 10). In addition, when calculating its combat result, the unit may claim an additional bonus of +1 combat result point.

magic_items.name: Totem of Wrath
magic_items.description: Cruel runes etched into the surface of this icon tremble with power, causing those around it to succumb to an animalistic ferocity.
magic_items.rules_text: During a turn in which it charged, models within a unit carrying the Totem of Wrath improve the Armour Piercing characteristic of their weapons by 1, and may re-roll any rolls To Wound of a natural 1.

lore_of_gork.name: Brain Bursta
lore_of_gork.effect: A single enemy model the caster is engaged in combat with suffers a single Strength 6 hit with the Multiple Wounds (D3) special rule and with no armour or Regeneration saves permitted (Ward saves can be attempted as normal).

lore_of_gork.name: Gaze of Gork
lore_of_gork.effect: Draw a straight line, 5D6" in length, from the caster's base edge. Any model (friend or foe) whose base falls under this line suffers a Strength 5 hit, with an AP of -3.

lore_of_mork.name: Mork's Curse
lore_of_mork.effect: Remains in Play. Whilst this spell is in play, the target enemy unit must re-roll any Armour Save roll of a natural 6.

lore_of_mork.name: Itchy Nuisance
lore_of_mork.effect: Until your next Start of Turn sub-phase, the target enemy unit suffers a -D3 modifier to its Toughness and Initiative characteristics (to a minimum of 1).

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Big Smartz
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Remains in Play. Whilst this spell is in play, friendly units within the Command range of this model may re-roll any failed Stupidity tests. Additionally, if a friendly unit within the Command range of this model when this spell is cast failed its Stupidity test during the Start of Turn sub-phase of the same turn, it may immediately make this test again.

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Acidic Bile
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Place a small (3") blast template so that its central hole is directly over the centre of the target enemy unit. Once placed, the template will scatter D3+1". Any enemy model whose base lies underneath the template's final position risks being hit and suffering a single Strength 3 hit with an AP of -2.

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Troll Brainz
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Remains in Play. Whilst this spell is in play, the target enemy unit becomes subject to the Stupidity special rule and reduces their Leadership characteristic by 1.

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Ravenous Recourse
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Until the end of this turn, all friendly units that have the Stupidity special rule and are within 12" of the caster gain a +2 modifier to their Movement characteristic.

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Foetid Whirlpool
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Remains in Play. Place a small (3") blast template so that its central hole is within 18" of the caster. Whilst in play, the template is treated as dangerous terrain. The template moves D6" in a random direction during every Start of Turn sub-phase. Any enemy unit the moving template touches or moves over suffers D3+3 Strength 4 hits, each with an AP of -2.

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Torrent of Filth
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Place a flame template so that the narrow end touches the caster's base edge and the broad end is over a unit they are engaged in combat with. Any model (friend or foe) whose base lies underneath the template risks being hit and suffering a single Strength 3 hit with an AP of -2.

lore_of_troll_magic.name: Rapid Regeneration
lore_of_troll_magic.effect: Until the end of your next Start of Turn sub-phase, the target friendly unit gains the Flammable and Regeneration (5+) special rules.
